release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 54. Refines the night glucose screen by vertically centering the large glucose value within the 64-line OLED layout using calculated font metrics, preventing the night number from sitting too low. Keeps the right-side arrow and delta/unit layout. Includes Build 53 Nightscout v2 SAGE auto-read, IOB/COB auto-read, improved insulin/bolus display, random audio alarm fatigue protection, Wi-Fi profile improvements, caregiver WhatsApp routing, and consolidated web UI structure.
